product_overview: A responsive personal portfolio website that showcases a professional's skills, projects, blog, and career openings while providing ways for visitors to subscribe and get in touch. This PRD uses the Portfolio Website Testing PRD (page 1-2) and the provided code summary as primary sources.
core_goals: Allow visitors to discover the person's skills, background, and unique value proposition
Let visitors browse and inspect showcased projects and visual demonstrations
Enable visitors to contact the owner via a contact form
Provide a simple way for visitors to subscribe to updates
Offer browsable blog posts and career listings for recruiters and collaborators

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Responsive site navigation that lets visitors jump to sections on the homepage or open top-level pages (blog, careers). On mobile, navigation collapses to a hamburger-style control.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Use navigation links to scroll to hero, about, projects, and contact sections -> Observe the page scroll to the selected section
Navigate to /index.html on a narrow viewport -> Toggle the mobile navigation control to reveal links -> Use navigation links to scroll to a section

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Top-of-page presentation that introduces the person and uses typewriter/terminal animation to emphasize key roles or skills.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Observe hero headline and typewriter animation -> Use navigation links to go to the projects section

features.name: About Section
features.description: A concise biography and overview of skills and experience so visitors can quickly assess fit for roles or projects.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Use navigation links or scroll to reach the about section -> Read the summary of experience and skills

features.name: Projects Showcase
features.description: A gallery of project cards demonstrating past work with interactive visuals (tilt) and short descriptions.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Use navigation links or scroll to reach the projects section -> Inspect a project card's title and summary -> Move mouse over a project card to see tilt/3D effect

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: A simple contact form on the homepage for visitors to send messages or inquiries directly.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Use navigation links or scroll to reach the contact section -> Fill required contact form fields -> Submit the contact form -> See confirmation of successful submission
Navigate to /index.html -> Use navigation links or scroll to reach the contact section -> Leave a required field blank -> Submit the contact form -> See inline validation error for the missing field

features.name: Newsletter Subscription
features.description: Footer form where visitors can subscribe to updates by providing their email address.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Scroll to the footer area -> Fill email in the newsletter subscription field -> Submit newsletter subscription -> See subscription confirmation
Navigate to /index.html -> Scroll to the footer area -> Enter an invalid email format -> Submit newsletter subscription -> See inline validation error for the email

features.name: Visual Effects and Animations
features.description: Background and section-level visual effects (Vanta/Three.js, AOS-like reveals, typewriter, card tilt) that enhance presentation and guide attention.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Scroll down to trigger section reveals and typewriter animations -> Observe animations reveal content in sequence
Navigate to /index.html -> Move mouse over interactive cards in the projects or services area -> Observe tilt/3D interaction on the card

features.name: Blog Browsing
features.description: A browsable blog index page where visitors can scan posts and navigate back to the rest of the site.
user_flows: Navigate to /blog.html -> Scan the list of posts and excerpts -> Use navigation links to return to /index.html or other site sections

features.name: Careers / Job Listings
features.description: A careers page listing opportunities or open roles and providing context for recruiters or applicants.
user_flows: Navigate to /career.html -> Scan job listings and role summaries -> Use navigation links to return to /index.html or contact the site owner

features.name: Responsive Layout
features.description: Site layouts and components adapt across viewport sizes to ensure readable content and preserved interactions on mobile and desktop (as emphasized in the Portfolio Website Testing PRD performance and responsiveness objectives on page 1).
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html on a desktop viewport -> Resize to a narrow viewport or open on a mobile device -> Verify content reflows and navigation collapses appropriately

routes.description: Homepage with hero, services, portfolio, and testimonials.
Blog page listing insights and thoughts.

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Responsive navigation menu with scroll triggers and mobile hamburger toggle.
user_interactions: Click on navigation links to scroll to sections or navigate to other pages.
Click hamburger menu on mobile to toggle navigation links.

features.name: Newsletter Subscription
features.description: A form at the bottom of the page for users to subscribe to updates.
user_interactions: Fill email input field in the footer.

features.name: Visual Effects
features.description: Advanced visual effects including Vanta background, AOS-like reveals, and typewriter terminal.
user_interactions: Scroll down to trigger section reveals and typewriter animations.
Move mouse to see tilt effects on cards.
